CC 2.1.176 auto-filed issues — grooming verdicts

cc-watch auto-files one adoption issue per changelog feature, then triage decides. Six 2.1.176 issues were verified read-only (one agent each: read the issue + grep ork's skills/agents/hooks). All six are closeable — five have no ork surface, one is a documented decline. Click a card for the evidence.

Result: 6/6 closeable · 0 real surfaces found. Closed via this grooming PR's closes keywords. Verification fan-out: 6 agents, ~389k tokens.
